size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } real t = 1.5; pair P, D, tD, tailP, tailD, tailtD; pair A, B, C, DD; P = (3,2); D = (-2,2); tD = t*D; A = g(0, P,D); B = g(1.5, P, D); C = (-2,6); DD = g(-2, P, D); tailP = (0,0); tailD = tailP; tailtD = tailP + P; //draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailtD -- tailtD + tD, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP + P, 2ESE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + 2D/3, SW, UnFill); label("$t\mathbf{d}$", tailtD -- tailtD + tD, NE, UnFill); label("$A$", A, NE, UnFill); label("$B$", B, NE, UnFill); label("$C$", C, NE, UnFill); label("$D$", DD, NE, UnFill); dot(A); dot(B); dot(C); dot(DD);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair V, P, D, tD, tailV, tailP, tailD, tailtD; real t; t= 2; P = (4,-1); D = (-2,3); tD = t*D; //draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple); label("$t = -1$", g(-1, P, D), NE, UnFill); label("$t = 0$", g(0, P, D), ENE, UnFill); label("$t = 1$", g(1, P, D), NE, UnFill); dot(g(-1, P, D)); dot(g(0, P, D)); dot(g(1, P, D));

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair V, P, D, tailV, tailP, tailD; real t; P = (2,4); D = (2,1); draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple); label("$t = -2$", g(-2, P, D), NW, UnFill); label("$t = 0$", g(0, P, D), NW, UnFill); label("$t = 2$", g(2, P, D), NW, UnFill); dot(g(-2, P, D)); dot(g(0, P, D)); dot(g(2, P, D));

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = false); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair P, D, tailP, tailD; pair A, B, C, DD; P = 4*dir(25); D = 3*dir(-115); A = g(2, P,D); B = 2P; C = g(-2, P, D); DD = g(1, P, D); tailP = (0,0); tailD = tailP; for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(maxLine(i*D, i*D + P, -9,9,-9,9), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*P, i*P + D, -9,9,-9,9), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP + P, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + 2D/3, WNW, UnFill); label("$A$", A, SE, UnFill); label("$B$", B, SE, UnFill); label("$C$", C, NW, UnFill); label("$D$", DD, SE, UnFill); dot(A); dot(B); dot(C); dot(DD);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = false); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair P, D, tailP, tailD; pair A, B, C, DD; P = 4*dir(25); D = 3*dir(-115); A = g(2, P,D); B = 2P; C = g(-2, P, D); DD = g(1, P, D); tailP = (0,0); tailD = tailP; for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(maxLine(i*D, i*D + P, -9,9,-9,9), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*P, i*P + D, -9,9,-9,9), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple + linewidth(1.2)); label("$A$", A, SE, UnFill); label("$B$", B, SE, UnFill); label("$C$", C, NW, UnFill); label("$D$", DD, SE, UnFill); dot(A); dot(B); dot(C); dot(DD);

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair P, D, R, tailP, tailD; P = (2,4); D = (2,1); R = (6,3); tailP = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(R--extension(P, P+D, R, R+N), dashed); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP + P, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + D, NE, UnFill); label("$R$", R, S, UnFill); dot(R);

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } pair P, D, R, SS, tailP, tailD; P = (2,4); D = (2,1); R = (6,3); SS = foot(R, P, P+D); tailP = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), -9,9,-9,9), purple); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(R--SS, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(R, SS, P, 15)); draw(P--R, brown + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(P--SS, heavygreen + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP + P, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + D, NE, UnFill); label("$R$", R, S, UnFill); label("$P$", P, NW, UnFill); label("$S$", SS, N, UnFill); dot(P); dot(SS); dot(R);

size(200); import TrigMacros; pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } int xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax; xmin = -2; xmax = 6; ymin = -2; ymax = 6; rr_cartesian_axes(xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax, complexplane=false); pair P1, D1, P2, D2, tailP1, tailD1, tailP2, tailD2; P1 = (1,1); D1 = (4,2); P2 = (4,1); D2 = (-3,3); draw(maxLine(g(0, P1,D1), g(1, P1, D1), xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax), purple); draw(maxLine(g(0, P2,D2), g(1, P2, D2), xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax), purple); label("$\ell_1$", g(1, P1, D1), NW, UnFill); label("$\ell_2$", g(1, P2, D2), NE, UnFill);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(1.9, 2.4, 0.7); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; triple P = intersectionpoints((-1.1,5.3, zmin) -- (-1.1, 5.3, zmax), surface(planeBoundary))[0]; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); draw(A--P, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$A$", A, NNW); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(1.9, 2.4, 0.7); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; triple P = intersectionpoints((-1.1,5.3, zmin) -- (-1.1, 5.3, zmax), surface(planeBoundary))[0]; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); draw(A--B, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(A--C, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$A$", A, NNW); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

#419 — c186_L21_script_1.asy

HiTeXeR

Source

size(200); import TrigMacros; pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } int xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax; xmin = -2; xmax = 6; ymin = -2; ymax = 6; pair P, D, tailP, tailD; P = (1,1); D = (4,2); tailP = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); rr_cartesian_axes(xmin,xmax,ymin,ymax,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP + 2P/3, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + D, SE, UnFill); label("$A$",g(0, P, D), N, UnFill); label("$B$",g(1, P, D), N, UnFill); dot(g(0, P, D)); dot(g(1, P, D));
Open in HiTeXeR

size(200); import TrigMacros; pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } int xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax; xmin = -2; xmax = 6; ymin = -2; ymax = 6; pair P, D, tailP, tailD; P = (1,1); D = (4,2); tailP = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); rr_cartesian_axes(xmin,xmax,ymin,ymax,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP + P, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + D, SE, UnFill);

//The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); draw(O--B, brown + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(O--C, orange + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

//The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); draw(O--A, magenta + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(1.9, 2.4, 0.7); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

//The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N); draw(A--B, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(A--C, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); dot("$A$", A, NNW); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

#426 — c186_L21_script_2.asy

size(200); import TrigMacros; pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } int xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax; xmin = -2; xmax = 6; ymin = -2; ymax = 6; pair P, D, tailP, tailD; P = (1,1); D = (4,2); tailP = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); rr_cartesian_axes(xmin,xmax,ymin,ymax,complexplane=false, usegrid = true); draw(maxLine(g(0, P,D), g(1, P, D), xmin,xmax,ymin,ymax), purple); draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP + P, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + D, SE, UnFill);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, 1.2, 1.4); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-2, -3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple U, V, NN,WW, tailU, tailV, tailN, tailW; U = D1; V = D1 + D2; NN = (6,7,4); WW = 2.1U + 0.7V; tailU = A - 1.5D1 + 0.5D2; tailV = tailU; tailW = tailU; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to U and V in the lower path: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*U, tailU+i*U + V, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*V, tailU+i*V + U, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); } draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw lines parallel to U and V in the upper path and also the dashed lines: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*U, tailU+i*U + V, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*U, tailU+i*U + V, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*V, tailU+i*V + U, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailU+i*V, tailU+i*V + U, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth,verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); } draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailU--tailU+U, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailV--tailV+V, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailW--tailW+WW, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{u}$", tailU -- tailU + U, SE); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV--tailV+V, W); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW+2WW/3, NW);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(200); import TrigMacros; pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } int xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax; xmin = -2; xmax = 6; ymin = -2; ymax = 6; rr_cartesian_axes(xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax, complexplane=false, usegrid = false); pair P1, D1, P2, D2, tailP1, tailD1, tailP2, tailD2; P1 = (1,1); D1 = (4,2); P2 = (4,1); D2 = (-3,3); draw(maxLine(g(0, P1,D1), g(1, P1, D1), xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax), purple); draw(maxLine(g(0, P2,D2), g(1, P2, D2), xmin,xmax,ymin, ymax), purple); label("$\ell_1$", g(1, P1, D1), NW, UnFill); label("$\ell_2$", g(1, P2, D2), NE, UnFill);
Open in HiTeXeR

unitsize(12cm); // Function to draw the vertical tickmarks void tickmark(real height, pair center, pen color) { draw(shift(0, -height) * center--shift(0, height) * center, color); } // Horizontal number line draw((0, 0)--(1, 0), ArcArrows); int divisions = 10; int n = 3 * divisions + 2; pair A = (1/n, 0); pair B = (1 - 1/n, 0); pair C = A + (divisions/n, 0); pair D = C + (divisions/n, 0); real height = 0.03; real size = 0.8; pair dir = 4.5 * S; tickmark(height, A, blue); label(scale(size) * "$0$", A, dir, blue); tickmark(height, C, blue); label(scale(size) * "$1$", C, dir, blue); tickmark(height, D, blue); label(scale(size) * "$2$", D, dir, blue); tickmark(height, B, blue); label(scale(size) * "$3$", B, dir, blue); label("$\frac{9}{10}$", C - (1/n, 0), dir); for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; ++i) { if (i == 1 || i == 1 + divisions || i == 1 + 2*divisions) continue; tickmark(height/2, (i/n, 0), black); } // draw the curvy arrow bits real arc = 1/n; pair[] vertices = {}; for (int i = 0; i < divisions + 2; ++i) { pair vertex_i = ((i + divisions) / n, 0); vertex_i = shift(0, 1.5*arc) * vertex_i; vertices.push(vertex_i); } pair[] midpoints = {}; for (int i = 1; i < vertices.length; ++i) { pair midpoint_i = midpoint(vertices[i-1]--vertices[i]); midpoint_i = shift(0, 0.4 * arc) * midpoint_i; midpoints.push(midpoint_i); } for (int i = 0; i < vertices.length - 1; ++i) { if (i == vertices.length - 2) draw(vertices[i]..midpoints[i]..vertices[i+1], EndArrow); draw(vertices[i]..midpoints[i]..vertices[i+1]); } label("$+\frac{11}{10}$", D - (0.75/n, 0), 8*N); dot(D, 6+black);

size(250); import TrigMacros; import olympiad; real theta = 45; pair A = (3,0); pair B = 3*dir(theta); pair O = (0,0); //Sizing up the grid and circle since otherwise, the labels for the axes //are in a funny place: rr_cartesian_axes(-5, 5, -5, 5, usegrid = false); draw(Circle(O, 3)); draw(O--3*dir(60)); dot("$\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}, \frac{1}{2}\right)$", 3*dir(30), E); draw(O--3*dir(30)); dot("$\left(\frac{1}{2}, \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)$", 3*dir(60), N); draw(O--3*dir(45)); dot("$\left(\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\right)$", 3*dir(45), dir(45)); dot("$(0,1)$", 3*dir(90), NW); dot("$(-1,0)$", 3*dir(180), SW); dot("$(1,0)$", 3*dir(0), SE); dot("$\left(-\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}, \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}\right)$", 3*dir(135), dir(135)); draw(O--3*dir(135));

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2, -3, 1); path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } triple U, V, WW, tailU, tailV, tailW, Norm, Foot; U = (3, 1, 0.4); V = 0.9*(1, 4, 0.7); WW = (2, 2, 3); Norm = cross(U, V); Foot = intersectionpoints(WW--WW-10*Norm, surface(O--U--U+V--V--cycle))[0]; draw(surface(O--U--U+V--V--cycle), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--U--U+V--V--cycle); draw(WW--U+WW--U+V+WW--V+WW--cycle); draw(O--WW^^U--U+WW^^U+V--U+V+WW^^V--V+WW); draw(tailU--tailU+U, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailV--tailV+V, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, heavygreen + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(Foot--WW, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(tailU, Foot, tailW + WW)); label("$\mathbf{u}$", tailU -- tailU + U, S); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV -- tailV + V, N); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW -- tailW + WW, NW); label("$h$", WW -- Foot, W);

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2, -3, 1); path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } triple U, V, WW, tailU, tailV, tailW, NN, Foot; U = (3, 1, 0.4); V = 0.9*(1, 4, 0.7); WW = (2, 2, 3); NN = cross(U, V); Foot = intersectionpoints(WW--WW-10*NN, surface(O--U--U+V--V--cycle))[0]; draw(surface(O--U--U+V--V--cycle), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--U--U+V--V--cycle); draw(WW--U+WW--U+V+WW--V+WW--cycle); draw(O--WW^^U--U+WW^^U+V--U+V+WW^^V--V+WW); draw(tailU--tailU+U, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailV--tailV+V, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, heavygreen + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(Foot--WW, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(tailU, Foot, tailW + WW)); label("$\mathbf{u}$", tailU -- tailU + U, S); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV -- tailV + V, N); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW -- tailW + WW, NW); label("$h$", WW -- Foot, W);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.8, 1.4); triple g(real s, real t, triple P, triple D1, triple D2) { return P + s*D1 + t*D2; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-2, -3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; P = A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -7; zmax = 10; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to U and V in the lower path: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); } draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw lines parallel to U and V in the upper path and also the dashed lines: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth,verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); } draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailD1--tailD1+D1, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailD2--tailD2+D2, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailP--tailP+P, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{d}_1$", tailD1 + D1, N); label("$\mathbf{d}_2$", tailD2+D2, N); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP+P/3, NE);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.8, 1.4); triple g(real s, real t, triple P, triple D1, triple D2) { return P + s*D1 + t*D2; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-2, -3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; P = A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -7; zmax = 10; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to U and V in the lower path: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); } draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw lines parallel to U and V in the upper path and also the dashed lines: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth,verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); } draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailD1--tailD1+D1, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailD2--tailD2+D2, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailP--tailP+P, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{d}_1$", tailD1 + D1, N); label("$\mathbf{d}_2$", tailD2+D2, N); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP+P/3, NE); dot("$A$", g(-1, 0, A, D1, D2));

size(220); import TrigMacros; rr_cartesian_axes(-9,9,-9,9,complexplane=false, usegrid = false); pair g(real t, pair P, pair D) { return P + t*D; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } real t = 1.8; pair P, D, tD, tailP, tailD, tailtD; pair A, B, C, DD; P = 3*dir(-25); D = 2.5*dir(-115); tD = t*D; A = 1.5 P + 2D; B = g(-3.7, P,D); C = g(1.8, P, D); DD = g(-2.3, P, D); tailP = (0,0); tailD = tailP; tailtD = tailP + P; draw(tailP -- tailP + P, blue + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD -- tailD + D, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailtD -- tailtD + tD, red + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP + P, SW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD + 2D/3, WNW, UnFill); label("$" + string(t) + "\mathbf{d}$", tailtD -- tailtD + tD, SE, UnFill); label("$A$", A, SE, UnFill); label("$B$", B, SE, UnFill); label("$C$", C, S, UnFill); label("$D$", DD, SE, UnFill); dot(A); dot(B); dot(C); dot(DD);

unitsize(0.2mm); //This line is here because without it, the scale of the diagram goes haywire. Don't ask why! label("a",(1,1),invisible); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void stone(real x,real y, pen color=black) { dot((x,y)+(1/2,1/2),color+10); } path L = (0,0)--(0,2)--(1,2)--(1,1)--(2,1)--(2,0)--cycle; drawboard(3,3); stone(0,0); stone(0,1); stone(2,1); stone(1,0,red); stone(1,1,red); stone(2,0,red); draw(box((0,0),(3,3)), black+2); add(shift(3,0)*currentpicture); add(shift(0,3)*currentpicture);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.9, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, SS, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); SS = R + proj(NN, P-R); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(SS--R, dashed); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); draw(rightanglemark(SS+3*NN, SS, SS+verVec, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$R$", R, N); dot("$S$", SS, S);
Open in HiTeXeR

#452 — c186_L20_script_55.asy

0.0000 · Bad Content 0.5169 Size 0.0000

Asymptote (Reference)
