size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.9, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, SS, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); SS = R + proj(NN, P-R); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(SS--R, dashed); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--R, brown+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--SS, orange + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); draw(rightanglemark(SS+3*NN, SS, P, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$R$", R, E); dot("$S$", SS, SSW);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.9, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, SS, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); SS = R + proj(NN, P-R); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(SS--R, dashed); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(SS--R, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--R, brown+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--SS, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); draw(rightanglemark(SS+3*NN, SS, P, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$R$", R, E); dot("$S$", SS, S);

P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, SS, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); SS = R + proj(NN, P-R); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(SS--R, dashed); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(SS--R, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--R, brown+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(P--SS, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); draw(rightanglemark(SS+3*NN, SS, P, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$R$", R, E); dot("$S$", SS, S);
Open in HiTeXeR

HiTeXeR

Source

//this is a template for creating scatter plots of data from physics experiments //-------ENTERING DATA, LABELS, AND EQUATION FOR CURVE------------ bool plotPoints = true; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {0,0.49,0.62,0.76, 0.81, 0.89, 1.0}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; //change to, e.g. "return x^2;" to plot x^2. } real[] ydata = {0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } string xAxisLabel = "time to reach ground (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "height dropped (m)"; //min and max x values for the curve to draw real xmin = 0; real xmax = 1; //min for the y axis real ymin = 0; //define what curve to draw real badfit(real t){ return 4.9*t^2; //change to the equation for your curve } real k = 0.0006; //define what curve to draw real goodfit(real t){ return 0.5*9.8*(t-0.18)^2; //change to the equation for your curve } //-------------AESTHETIC THINGS------------ //size of entire image in cm real xsize = 10; real ysize = 8; //style of graph pen graphpen = deepred+linewidth(1.0 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; //size pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //can change to "NoFill" for hollow dots //axes real xTickSpacing = 0.1; //must be entered as a decimal real xSubtickSpacing = 0.1; //set equal to xTickSpacing if you don't want little ticks real yTickSpacing = 1; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.5; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = false; bool xAxisArrow = false; bool yAxisArrow = false; //gridlines bool bigGrid = true; //gridlines for the labeled tick marks bool smallGrid = true; //gridlines for the smaller subticks //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); import graph; real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(goodfit, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen+deepgreen); draw(graph(badfit, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen+deepred);} real xlabel_loc = 0.5; //what fraction down the axis you want the label real ylabel_loc = 0.5; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisArrow){ xarrow = Arrow; } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisArrow){ yarrow = Arrow; } if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xAxisLabel, Bottom, arrow = xarrow, Ticks(xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing)); yaxis(ymin = ymin, L = yAxisLabel, Left, arrow = yarrow, Ticks(yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing)); } else{ xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xAxisLabel, Bottom, arrow = xarrow, LeftTicks(xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing)); yaxis(ymin = ymin, L = yAxisLabel, Left, arrow = yarrow, RightTicks(yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing)); } if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); }
Open in HiTeXeR

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2, 3.1, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple V, triple U) { return (U.x * V.x + U.y * V.y + U.z*V.z)/(U.x^2 + U.y^2 + U.z^2)* U; } //The reflection of V in U: triple reflect(triple V, triple U) { return 2*proj(V,U) - V; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } triple K, I, P, offset, tailK, tailI, tailP; real theta = 180; K = (0,0,1); I = (1,0,0); P = proj(I, K); //The tail of the vector being projected; shifts the line: offset = (2.5,1,2); tailI = offset; tailK = offset+2K; tailP = tailI; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -4; xmax = 4; ymin = -4; ymax = 4; zmin = -3; zmax = 6; path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple + linewidth(1.0)); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(maxLineBox(offset, K+offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax),surface(xyplane)), purple+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple+ dotted+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(tailK -- tailK + K, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailI -- tailI + I, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$\mathbf{k}$", tailK -- tailK + K, 1.5W); label("$\mathbf{i}$", tailI -- tailI + I, N); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W); dot(tailK, red); dot(tailI, blue);

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2, 3.1, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple V, triple U) { return (U.x * V.x + U.y * V.y + U.z*V.z)/(U.x^2 + U.y^2 + U.z^2)* U; } //The reflection of V in U: triple reflect(triple V, triple U) { return 2*proj(V,U) - V; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } triple K, P, offset, tailK2, tailK1, tailP; K = (0,0,1); P = proj(K, K); //The tail of the vector being projected; shifts the line: offset = (2.5,1,2); tailK2 = offset; tailK1 = offset+2K; tailP = tailK2; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -4; xmax = 4; ymin = -4; ymax = 4; zmin = -3; zmax = 6; path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple + linewidth(1.0)); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(maxLineBox(offset, K+offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax),surface(xyplane)), purple+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple+ dotted+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(tailK1 -- tailK1 + K, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailK2 -- tailK2 + K, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$\mathbf{k}$", tailK1 -- tailK1 + K, 1.5W); label("$\mathbf{k}$", tailK2 -- tailK2 + K, 1.5W); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W); dot(tailK1, red); dot(tailK2, blue);

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2, 3.1, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple V, triple U) { return (U.x * V.x + U.y * V.y + U.z*V.z)/(U.x^2 + U.y^2 + U.z^2)* U; } //The reflection of V in U: triple reflect(triple V, triple U) { return 2*proj(V,U) - V; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } triple K, J, P, offset, tailK, tailJ, tailP; K = (0,0,1); J = (0,1,0); P = proj(J, K); //The tail of the vector being projected; shifts the line: offset = (2.5,1,2); tailJ = offset; tailK = offset+2K; tailP = tailJ; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -4; xmax = 4; ymin = -4; ymax = 4; zmin = -3; zmax = 6; path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple + linewidth(1.0)); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(maxLineBox(offset, K+offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax),surface(xyplane)), purple+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(maxLineBox(offset, K + offset, xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax), purple+ dotted+ linewidth(1.0)); draw(tailK -- tailK + K, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailJ -- tailJ + J, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$\mathbf{k}$", tailK -- tailK + K, 1.5W); label("$\mathbf{j}$", tailJ -- tailJ + J, N); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W); dot(tailK, red); dot(tailJ, blue);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.9, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, SS, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); SS = R + proj(NN, P-R); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(SS--R, dashed); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); draw(rightanglemark(SS+3*NN, SS, SS+verVec, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$R$", R, N); dot("$S$", SS, SSW);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, -2.9, 0.8); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 9; //A point on the plane: A = (-3, -4, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = (-3,2,1); D2 = (1,-2,2); triple NN, P, R, tailN; P = A + D2; NN = (6,7,4); R = (1,1,6); tailN = A + 1.4(D1 + D2); //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -10; zmax = 9; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailN--tailN+NN, magenta+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+3*NN, tailN, tailN+verVec, 15)); label("$x$", xmax*X, SE); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, NW); dot("$P$", P, N); dot("$R$", R, N);

unitsize(.15mm); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void color(pair p, int i, pen color=defaultpen) { label("$"+string(i)+"$",p+(1/2,1/2),color); } int n = 7; //size of grid fill(box(((n-1)/2,(n-1)/2),((n+1)/2,(n+1)/2)),gray(0.8)); drawboard(n,n); currentpicture = shift(-(n-1)/2,-(n-1)/2)*currentpicture; color((0,0),0);

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2.9, 2.1, 1); //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } triple U, V,WW, tailU, tailV, tailW; O = (0,0,0); U = (1, 2, 0); V = (-2, 1, 0); WW = (3, -4, 0); tailU = O; tailV = tailU; tailW = tailU; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -5; xmax = 5; ymin = -5; ymax = 5; zmin = -4; zmax = 4; path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to U and V: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(i*U, i*U + V, O, Z, xmax - xmin, ymax-ymin), linewidth(0.4)+gray); draw(maxLinePlane(i*V, i*V + U, O, Z, xmax - xmin, ymax-ymin), linewidth(0.4)+gray); } draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(tailU--tailU + U, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailV--tailV + V, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailW--tailW + WW, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$\mathbf{u}$", tailU + U, S); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV + V, E); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW + 2WW/3, S); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W);

size(250); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(6.3, 3.9, 1.7); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box. path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { path3[] endpoints; triple offset = (xmin, ymin, zmin); real s = abs(xmax) + abs(xmin) + abs(ymax) + abs(ymin) + abs(zmax) + abs(zmin); endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+s*unit(B-A) -- A-s*unit(B-A), shift(offset)*scale(xmax-xmin, ymax-ymin, zmax-zmin)*unitcube); if (endpoints.length > 1) return endpoints[1]--endpoints[0]; else return nullpath3; } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component triple dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); triple dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } triple O, A,B,C, P, D1, D2, X, Y, Z; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real verHeight, horWidth; int big; //Scale to make the xy-plane bigger. big = 8; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 10; //Points on the plane; A = (0,1,1); B = (1,1,0); C = (1,0,3); //Shift vector: P = A; //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; O = (0,0,0); X = (1, 0, 0); Y = (0, 1, 0); Z = (0, 0, 1); //Path corresponding to the plane z = 0: xyplane = -(big - 0.1)*X - (big - 0.1)*Y-- -(big - 0.1)*X + (big - 0.1)*Y -- (big - 0.1)*X + (big - 0.1)*Y -- (big - 0.1)*X - (big - 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, -big+0.3, big-0.3, -big+0.3, big-0.3, -big+0.3, big-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- big*Y); draw(O-- big*X); draw(O-- -big*Y, Arrow3(6)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--big*X, dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(O--big*Y,dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(O-- -big*X, dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(O-- -big*Y, dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(lineUntilPlane(big*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- -big*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- -big*Z, dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(O-- big*Z, dotted, Arrow3(6)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", big*X, 2S); label("$y$", big*Y, 2S); label("$z$", big*Z, 2N); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, S); dot("$C$", C, W);

import three; size(7cm); unitsize(1 cm); currentprojection=perspective(6,3,2); triple A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, P, Q, R; A = (1,1,0); B = (1,0,0); C = (0,0,0); D = (0,1,0); E = (1,1,1); F = (1,0,1); G = (0,0,1); H = (0,1,1); P = (3*A + 2*B)/5; Q = (4*A + E)/5; R = D + (0,0,5/2/5); draw(A--B--F--G--H--D--cycle); draw(E--A); draw(E--F); draw(E--H); draw(C--B,dashed); draw(C--G,dashed); draw(C--D,dashed); draw(R--C--P,dashed); draw(P--Q--R); label("$A$", A, S); label("$B$", B, W); label("$C$", C, NW); label("$D$", D, dir(0)); label("$E$", E, SE); label("$F$", F, NW); label("$G$", G, N); label("$H$", H, NE); dot("$P$", P, S); dot("$Q$", Q, NW); dot("$R$", R, dir(0));

HiTeXeR

Source

import graph; size(7cm); real f(real y){return ((4-y^3)/y^2);} real g(real y){return (3);} draw(reflect((0,0),(1,1))*graph(f,-5,-0.1),black+1bp); draw(reflect((0,0),(1,1))*graph(f,0.1,5),black+1bp); draw(reflect((0,0),(1,1))*graph(g,-5,5),blue); xlimits( -3, 10, crop=Crop); ylimits( -5, 5, crop=Crop); xaxis(NoTicks,Arrows); yaxis(NoTicks,Arrows); dot("$(3,-2)$",(3,-2),W);
Open in HiTeXeR

#473 — c463_L13_script_34.asy

0.0000 · Bad Content 0.3501 Size 0.0000

Asymptote (Reference)

Not rendered

HiTeXeR

Source

unitsize(.15mm); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void color(pair p, int i, pen color=defaultpen) { label("$"+string(i)+"$",p+(1/2,1/2),color); } int n = 7; //size of grid fill(box(((n-1)/2,(n-1)/2),((n+1)/2,(n+1)/2)),gray(0.8)); drawboard(n,n); currentpicture = shift(-(n-1)/2,-(n-1)/2)*currentpicture; path stet = (0,0)--(2,0)--(2,1)--(3,1)--(3,2)--(1,2)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle; path htet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*stet; path ztet = shift(1,0)*scale(-1,1)*stet; path ftet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*ztet; draw(shift(0,1)*htet,black+2); color((0,0),0); color((0,1),0); color((1,0),0); color((1,-1),0,red);
Open in HiTeXeR

HiTeXeR

unitsize(.15mm); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void color(pair p, int i, pen color=defaultpen) { label("$"+string(i)+"$",p+(1/2,1/2),color); } int n = 7; //size of grid fill(box(((n-1)/2,(n-1)/2),((n+1)/2,(n+1)/2)),gray(0.8)); drawboard(n,n); currentpicture = shift(-(n-1)/2,-(n-1)/2)*currentpicture; color((0,0),0); color((0,1),0); color((1,0),0);

#475 — c186_L20_script_17.asy

0.0000 · Bad Content 0.3753 Size 0.0000

Asymptote (Reference)

HiTeXeR

Source

size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 7; picture pic1, pic2; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2; pair V, WW, P, Q,R, tailV, tailW, tailP, tailQ, tailR; pair outV, outW, outP, outQ, outR, tailoutV, tailoutW, tailoutP, tailoutQ, tailoutR; //Centers of input and output grids, respectively: O1 = (0,0); O2 = (2*big + 1, 0); //The standard coordinate axes: I = (1,0); J = (0,1); //The columns of our matrix: col1 = (1,-1); col2 = (1,3); //Input vectors; V = (1,1); WW = (2, -1); P = 2V+WW; Q = -V; R = (-3,1); //Tails of input vectors: tailV = (0,0); tailW = (0,0); //Output vectors: outV = multByMat(V, col1, col2); outW = multByMat(WW, col1, col2); outP = multByMat(P, col1, col2); outQ = multByMat(Q, col1, col2); outR = multByMat(R, col1, col2); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw axes: draw(-big*I -- big*I, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(-big*J -- big*J, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*I -- big*I), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*J -- big*J), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outV, i*outV + outW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outW, i*outW + outV, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*V, i*V + WW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*WW, i*WW + V, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailV--tailV+V, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailR--tailR +R, brown+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV+V, ENE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW +WW, SE, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutV+outV), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutW +outW), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutR--tailoutR + outR), brown+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{v}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutV+outV), NE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{w}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutW +outW), E, UnFill); label("Inputs:", (big+1.5)*J); label("Outputs:", shift(O2)*((big + 1.5)*J)); label("$P$", P, N, UnFill); label("$Q$", Q, SW, UnFill); label("$R$", R, NW, UnFill); label("$C$", shift(O2)*outP, S, UnFill); label("$D$", shift(O2)*outQ, SW, UnFill); label("$B$", shift(O2)*outR, W, UnFill); dot(shift(O2)*outP); dot(shift(O2)*outQ); dot(shift(O2)*outR); dot(P); dot(Q); dot(R);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 7; picture pic1, pic2; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2; pair V, WW, P, Q,R, tailV, tailW, tailP, tailQ, tailR; pair outV, outW, outP, outQ, outR, tailoutV, tailoutW, tailoutP, tailoutQ, tailoutR; //Centers of input and output grids, respectively: O1 = (0,0); O2 = (2*big + 1, 0); //The standard coordinate axes: I = (1,0); J = (0,1); //The columns of our matrix: col1 = (1,-1); col2 = (1,3); //Input vectors; V = (1,1); WW = (2, -1); P = 2V+WW; Q = -V; R = (-3,1); //Tails of input vectors: tailV = (0,0); tailW = (0,0); //Output vectors: outV = multByMat(V, col1, col2); outW = multByMat(WW, col1, col2); outP = multByMat(P, col1, col2); outQ = multByMat(Q, col1, col2); outR = multByMat(R, col1, col2); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw axes: draw(-big*I -- big*I, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(-big*J -- big*J, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*I -- big*I), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*J -- big*J), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outV, i*outV + outW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outW, i*outW + outV, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*V, i*V + WW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*WW, i*WW + V, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailV--tailV+V, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailQ--tailQ +Q, heavygreen+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV+V, ENE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW +WW, SE, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutV+outV), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutW +outW), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutQ--tailoutQ + outQ), heavygreen+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{v}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutV+outV), NE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{w}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutW +outW), E, UnFill); label("Inputs:", (big+1.5)*J); label("Outputs:", shift(O2)*((big + 1.5)*J)); label("$P$", P, N, UnFill); label("$Q$", Q, SW, UnFill); label("$R$", R, N, UnFill); label("$C$", shift(O2)*outP, S, UnFill); label("$D$", shift(O2)*outQ, SW, UnFill); label("$B$", shift(O2)*outR, W, UnFill); dot(shift(O2)*outP); dot(shift(O2)*outQ); dot(shift(O2)*outR); dot(P); dot(Q); dot(R);

size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 7; picture pic1, pic2; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2; pair V, WW, P, Q,R, tailV, tailW, tailP, tailQ, tailR; pair outV, outW, outP, outQ, outR, tailoutV, tailoutW, tailoutP, tailoutQ, tailoutR; //Centers of input and output grids, respectively: O1 = (0,0); O2 = (2*big + 1, 0); //The standard coordinate axes: I = (1,0); J = (0,1); //The columns of our matrix: col1 = (1,-1); col2 = (1,3); //Input vectors; V = (1,1); WW = (2, -1); P = 2V+WW; Q = -V; R = (-3,1); //Tails of input vectors: tailV = (0,0); tailW = (0,0); //Output vectors: outV = multByMat(V, col1, col2); outW = multByMat(WW, col1, col2); outP = multByMat(P, col1, col2); outQ = multByMat(Q, col1, col2); outR = multByMat(R, col1, col2); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw axes: draw(-big*I -- big*I, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(-big*J -- big*J, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*I -- big*I), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*J -- big*J), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outV, i*outV + outW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outW, i*outW + outV, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*V, i*V + WW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*WW, i*WW + V, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailV--tailV+V, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV+V, N, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW +WW, SE, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutV+outV), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutW +outW), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{v}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutV+outV), E, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{w}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutW +outW), E, UnFill); label("Inputs:", (big+1.5)*J); label("Outputs:", shift(O2)*((big + 1.5)*J)); label("$P$", P, N, UnFill); label("$Q$", Q, SW, UnFill); label("$R$", R, N, UnFill); label("$C$", shift(O2)*outP, S, UnFill); label("$D$", shift(O2)*outQ, SW, UnFill); label("$B$", shift(O2)*outR, W, UnFill); dot(shift(O2)*outP); dot(shift(O2)*outQ); dot(shift(O2)*outR); dot(P); dot(Q); dot(R);

size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 7; picture pic1, pic2; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2; pair V, WW, P, Q,R, tailV, tailW, tailP, tailQ, tailR; pair outV, outW, outP, outQ, outR, tailoutV, tailoutW, tailoutP, tailoutQ, tailoutR; //Centers of input and output grids, respectively: O1 = (0,0); O2 = (2*big + 1, 0); //The standard coordinate axes: I = (1,0); J = (0,1); //The columns of our matrix: col1 = (1,-1); col2 = (1,3); //Input vectors; V = (1,1); WW = (2, -1); P = 2V+WW; Q = -V; R = (-3,1); //Tails of input vectors: tailV = (0,0); tailW = (0,0); //Output vectors: outV = multByMat(V, col1, col2); outW = multByMat(WW, col1, col2); outP = multByMat(P, col1, col2); outQ = multByMat(Q, col1, col2); outR = multByMat(R, col1, col2); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw axes: draw(-big*I -- big*I, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(-big*J -- big*J, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*I -- big*I), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*J -- big*J), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outV, i*outV + outW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outW, i*outW + outV, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*V, i*V + WW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*WW, i*WW + V, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailV--tailV+V, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailP--tailP +P, magenta+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); //draw(tailQ--tailQ +Q, brown+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); //draw(tailR--tailR +R, orange+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV+V, N, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW +WW, SE, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutV+outV), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutW +outW), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); //draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutP--tailoutP + outP), magenta+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 7; picture pic1, pic2; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2; pair V, WW, P, Q,R, tailV, tailW, tailP, tailQ, tailR; pair outV, outW, outP, outQ, outR, tailoutV, tailoutW, tailoutP, tailoutQ, tailoutR; V = (1,1); WW = (2, -1); P = 2V+WW; Q = -V; R = (-3,1); //Tails of input vectors: tailV = (0,0); tailW = (0,0); //Output vectors: outV = multByMat(V, col1, col2); outW = multByMat(WW, col1, col2); outP = multByMat(P, col1, col2); outQ = multByMat(Q, col1, col2); outR = multByMat(R, col1, col2); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw axes: draw(-big*I -- big*I, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(-big*J -- big*J, linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*I -- big*I), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); draw(shift(O2)*(-big*J -- big*J), linewidth(0.6), Arrows(5)); //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outV, i*outV + outW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outW, i*outW + outV, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*V, i*V + WW, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(maxLine(i*WW, i*WW + V, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailV--tailV+V, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailW--tailW +WW, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailP--tailP +P, magenta+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV+V, N, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW +WW, SE, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutV+outV), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutV -- tailoutW +outW), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutP--tailoutP + outP), magenta+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{v}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutV+outV), E, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{w}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutW +outW), E, UnFill); label("Inputs:", (big+1.5)*J); label("Outputs:", shift(O2)*((big + 1.5)*J)); label("$P$", P, N, UnFill); label("$Q$", Q, SW, UnFill); label("$R$", R, N, UnFill); label("$C$", shift(O2)*outP, S, UnFill); label("$D$", shift(O2)*outQ, SW, UnFill); label("$B$", shift(O2)*outR, W, UnFill); dot(shift(O2)*outP); dot(shift(O2)*outQ); dot(shift(O2)*outR); dot(P); dot(Q); dot(R);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(1.9, 2.4, 0.7); path3 rightanglemark(triple A, triple B, triple C, real s=8) { triple P,Q,R; P=s*markscalefactor*unit(A-B)+B; R=s*markscalefactor*unit(C-B)+B; Q=P+R-B; return P--Q--R; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2, PP, D; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Point on line: PP = (-3,-2,6); //Direction vector for line: D = (-2,3,1); //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //A point on the plane: A = (-4, -2, 2); //Other points on the plane: B = (-3,1,4); C =(-2,2,3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -10; xmax = 6; ymin = -6; ymax = 8; zmin = -8; zmax = 8; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Normal vector and its tail: triple NN = -8*Normal; triple tailN = B + D1 - 5.5horVec + 0.11verVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(tailN -- tailN + NN, magenta + linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(rightanglemark(tailN+NN, tailN, tailN + verVec, 15)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$\mathbf{n}$", tailN -- tailN + NN, N); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, SE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

import three; size(6cm); unitsize(1 cm); currentprojection=perspective(6,3,2); triple A, B, C, D, E, M, O; A = (3,3,0); B = (3,-3,0); C = (-3,-3,0); D = (-3,3,0); E = (0,0,3*sqrt(2)); M = (A + B)/2; O = (0,0,0); draw(D--A--B); draw(B--C--D,dashed); draw(E--A); draw(E--B); draw(E--C,dashed); draw(E--D); draw(E--O--M,dashed); draw(E--M); label("$A$", A, S); label("$B$", B, W); label("$C$", C, NW); label("$D$", D, dir(0)); label("$E$", E, N); label("$M$", M, SW); dot("$O$", O, SE);

size(230); import TrigMacros; //Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } //Multiply a matrix with columns col1 and col2 by the vector X pair multByMat (pair X, pair col1, pair col2) { return (col1.x*X.x + col2.x*X.y, col1.y*X.x + col2.y*X.y); } //Draws grid lines with the given parameters: void gridLines(int xmin, int xmax, int ymin, int ymax) { for(int i = ymin+1; i< ymax; ++i) { draw((xmin,i)--(xmax,i), mediumgray); } for(int i = xmin+1; i< xmax; ++i) { draw((i,ymax)--(i,ymin), mediumgray); } } //Size of the grids: int big = 4; pair O1, O2, I, J, col1, col2, tailI, tailJ; pair A, B, C, D, tailA, tailB, tailC, tailD; pair outI, outJ, outD, tailoutI, tailoutJ, tailoutD; //Centers of input and output grids, respectively: O1 = (0,0); O2 = (2*big + 1, 0); //The standard coordinate axes: I = (1,0); J = (0,1); //The columns of our matrix: col1 = (2,1); col2 = (1,2); //Input vectors; A = (0.8, 1.3); B = (-1.1,0.4); C = (2.1, 1.5); D = (0.8,-1.9); //Tails of input vectors: tailA = (0,0); tailB = (0,0); tailC = (0,0); tailD = (0,0); //Output vectors: outI = multByMat(I, col1, col2); outJ = multByMat(J, col1, col2); outD = multByMat(D, col1, col2); //Tails of output vectors: tailoutI = (0,0); tailoutJ = (0,0); tailoutD = (0,0); //Draw grid lines parallel to the axes for (int i = -big + 1; i < big; ++i) { draw(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J, mediumgray+ linewidth(0.5)); draw(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I, mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*I+ big*J--i*I - big*J), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); draw(shift(O2)*(i*J + big*I--i*J - big*I), mediumgray + linewidth(0.5)); } //Draw output grid lines parallel to col1 and col2. for (int i = -8; i < 10; ++i) { draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outI, i*outI + outJ, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); draw(shift(O2)*maxLine(i*outJ, i*outJ + outI, -big, big, -big, big), linewidth(0.4)); } draw(tailI--tailI+I, red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailJ--tailJ +J, blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailA--tailA +A, purple + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailB--tailB +B, brown + linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailC--tailC +C, orange +linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(tailD--tailD +D, heavygreen +linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{i}$", tailI+I, SE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{j}$", tailJ +J, NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{a}$", tailA +A, N, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{b}$", tailB--tailB +B, S, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{c}$", tailC +C, NE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{d}$", tailD +D, S, UnFill); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutI--tailoutI +outI), red+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutJ--tailoutJ +outJ), blue+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); draw(shift(O2)*(tailoutD--tailoutD+outD), heavycyan+linewidth(1.0), Arrow(7)); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{i}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutI+outI), SE, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{A}\mathbf{j}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutJ +outJ/2), NW, UnFill); label("$\mathbf{v}$", shift(O2)*(tailoutD +outD), SW, UnFill); label("Inputs:", (big+1)*J); label("Outputs:", shift(O2)*((big + 1)*J));
