unitsize(4mm); int gcd(int m, int n){ int g; if(n==0){ return m; } g = gcd(n,m%n); return g; } picture starNM(int n, int m){ pair[] starVertices; int k = n#(gcd(n,m)); //int k = n; starVertices.cyclic=true; // Makes the indexes cyclic int[] indicesV = sequence(n); int[] indicesS = sequence(k); picture p=new picture; size(p,150); draw(p,circle((0,0),1),green); for(int i : indicesV){ starVertices.push(dir(-90+180/n+360*i/n)); // We place the first vertex near the south } for(int i : indicesV){ dot(p,starVertices[i]); } for(int i: indicesS){ draw(p,starVertices[i*m]--starVertices[(i + 1)*m],blue); label(p,"$P_{"+string(i+1)+"}$",starVertices[i*m], starVertices[i*m]); } return p; } picture star=starNM(8,3); add(star.fit());
Open in HiTeXeR

size(220); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(2.9, 2.1, 1); //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } triple U, V,WW, tailU, tailV, tailW; U = (1, 2, 0); V = (-2, 1, 0); WW = (1, -4, 5); tailU = O; tailV = tailU; tailW = tailU; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -5; xmax = 5; ymin = -5; ymax = 5; zmin = -4; zmax = 7; path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to U and V: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(i*U, i*U + V, O, Z, xmax - xmin, ymax-ymin), linewidth(0.4)+gray); draw(maxLinePlane(i*V, i*V + U, O, Z, xmax - xmin, ymax-ymin), linewidth(0.4)+gray); } draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(tailU--tailU + U, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailV--tailV + V, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailW--tailW + WW, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$\mathbf{u}$", tailU + U, S); label("$\mathbf{v}$", tailV + V, E); label("$\mathbf{w}$", tailW + 2WW/3, NE); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, W);

unitsize(.15mm); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void color(pair p, int i, pen color=defaultpen) { label("$"+string(i)+"$",p+(1/2,1/2),color); } int n = 7; //size of grid fill(box(((n-1)/2,(n-1)/2),((n+1)/2,(n+1)/2)),gray(0.8)); drawboard(n,n); currentpicture = shift(-(n-1)/2,-(n-1)/2)*currentpicture; path stet = (0,0)--(2,0)--(2,1)--(3,1)--(3,2)--(1,2)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle; path htet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*stet; path ztet = shift(1,0)*scale(-1,1)*stet; path ftet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*ztet; draw(shift(1,0)*ztet,black+2); color((0,0),0); color((0,1),0); color((1,0),0); color((-1,1),1,red);

unitsize(4mm); int gcd(int m, int n){ int g; if(n==0){ return m; } g = gcd(n,m%n); return g; } picture starNM(int n, int m){ pair[] starVertices; int k = n#(gcd(n,m)); //int k = n; starVertices.cyclic=true; // Makes the indexes cyclic int[] indicesV = sequence(n); int[] indicesS = sequence(k); picture p=new picture; size(p,150); draw(p,circle((0,0),1),green); for(int i : indicesV){ starVertices.push(dir(-90+180/n+360*i/n)); // We place the first vertex near the south } for(int i : indicesV){ dot(p,starVertices[i]); } for(int i: indicesS){ draw(p,starVertices[i*m]--starVertices[(i + 1)*m],blue); label(p,"$P_"+string(i+1)+"$",starVertices[i*m], starVertices[i*m]); } return p; } picture star=starNM(6,2); add(star.fit());

unitsize(.15mm); void plainbox(int i, int j) { draw((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle); } void checkerboard(int i, int j) { plainbox(i,j); pen[] colors = {gray(0.5),white}; fill((0,0)--(1,0)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle,colors[(i+j)%2]); } void drawboard(int x, int y, void checker(int,int)=plainbox) { for (int i=0; i<x; ++i) { for (int j=0; j<y; ++j) { currentpicture = shift(-i,-j)*currentpicture; checker(i,j); currentpicture = shift(i,j)*currentpicture; }} } void color(pair p, int i, pen color=defaultpen) { label("$"+string(i)+"$",p+(1/2,1/2),color); } int n = 7; //size of grid fill(box(((n-1)/2,(n-1)/2),((n+1)/2,(n+1)/2)),gray(0.8)); drawboard(n,n); currentpicture = shift(-(n-1)/2,-(n-1)/2)*currentpicture; path stet = (0,0)--(2,0)--(2,1)--(3,1)--(3,2)--(1,2)--(1,1)--(0,1)--cycle; path htet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*stet; path ztet = shift(1,0)*scale(-1,1)*stet; path ftet = shift(0,1)*rotate(-90)*ztet; //draw(shift(0,1)*htet,black+2); color((0,0),0); color((0,1),0); color((1,0),0); color((-1,1),1); color((1,-1),0);

HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(3.1, 3.9, 1.7); triple g(real s, real t, triple P, triple D1, triple D2) { return P + s*D1 + t*D2; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //Points on the plane: A = (-4,-1,2); B = (-3, 2, 4); C = (-2, 3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; P = A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -7; zmax = 10; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmin*Z); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw grid lines parallel to D1 and D2 in the lower path: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine), Normal, horWidth,2*verHeight), mediumgray); } draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); //Draw lines parallel to D1 and D2 in the upper path and also the dashed lines: for (int i = -40; i < 40; ++i) { draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D1, tailD1+i*D1 + D2, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)+verVec/2, Normal, horWidth, verHeight), mediumgray); draw(maxLinePlane(tailD1+i*D2, tailD1+i*D2 + D1, midpoint(horLine)- verVec/2, Normal, horWidth,verHeight), mediumgray + dotted); } draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailD1--tailD1+D1, red+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailD2--tailD2+D2, blue+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); draw(tailP--tailP+P, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, E); label("$\mathbf{d}_1$", tailD1 -- tailD1 + D1, NW); label("$\mathbf{d}_2$", tailD2 -- tailD2+D2, S); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP+P, NW); dot("$O$", O, SW);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(3.1, 3.9, 1.7); triple g(real s, real t, triple P, triple D1, triple D2) { return P + s*D1 + t*D2; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //Points on the plane: A = (-4,-1,2); B = (-3, 2, 4); C = (-2, 3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; P = A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -8.6; zmax = 10; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); draw(tailP--tailP+P, heavygreen+ linewidth(1.0), Arrow3(7)); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, NW); label("$\mathbf{p}$", tailP -- tailP+P, NW); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, NE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(3.1, 3.9, 1.7); triple g(real s, real t, triple P, triple D1, triple D2) { return P + s*D1 + t*D2; } //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 8; //Points on the plane: A = (-4,-1,2); B = (-3, 2, 4); C = (-2, 3, 3); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; tailD1 = A; tailD2 = tailD1; P = A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -8; xmax = 8; ymin = -8; ymax = 8; zmin = -8.6; zmax = 10; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- xmin*X,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- ymin*Y,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, NW); dot("$A$", A, N); dot("$B$", B, N); dot("$C$", C, NE); dot("$O$", O, SW);

#492 — c463_L10_script_1.asy

0.0000 · Bad Content 0.4884 Size 0.0000

HiTeXeR

Source

unitsize(2cm); pen cbred=RGB(224,109,128); pen cbblue=RGB(136,204,238); pen cbgreen=RGB(72,189,107); real green_size = 2.5; real z_hyperbola(real x) { return -1/x; } real z_top_line(real x) { return -green_size * x; } real z_bottom_line(real x) { return -(1/green_size)*x; } real intersection_bottom_x = -sqrt(green_size); real intersection_top_x = -1/sqrt(green_size); real ellipse_factor = 1.3; real r = sqrt(1/(ellipse_factor * ellipse_factor * green_size) + green_size); real tick_coordinate = 2; real tick_length = tick_coordinate * 0.06; real axis_max = tick_coordinate * 1.2; real short_axis = axis_max - tick_coordinate; pair[] directions = {(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)}; draw((-axis_max,0)--(short_axis,0), gray, Arrows()); draw((0,-short_axis)--(0,axis_max), gray, Arrows()); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, -tick_coordinate, intersection_bottom_x), cbred+dashed); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, intersection_bottom_x, intersection_top_x), cbgreen+2); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, intersection_top_x, -1/tick_coordinate), cbred+dashed); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, 1/tick_coordinate, -intersection_top_x), cbred+dashed); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, -intersection_top_x, -intersection_bottom_x), cbgreen+2); draw(graph(z_hyperbola, -intersection_bottom_x, tick_coordinate), cbred+dashed); draw(graph(z_top_line, -tick_coordinate/3, tick_coordinate/3), cbblue); draw(graph(z_bottom_line, -tick_coordinate, tick_coordinate), cbblue); draw(scale(r)*ellipse((0, 0), ellipse_factor, 1)); dot((intersection_top_x, z_hyperbola(intersection_top_x))); limits((-axis_max, -short_axis), (short_axis, axis_max), crop=Crop);
Open in HiTeXeR

//TeXeR source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/uelraggw draw((-1,0)--(5,0), arrow = Arrow(TeXHead)); label("time",(4,0),S); draw((0,-1)--(0,4) , arrow = Arrow(TeXHead)); label(rotate(90)*"scale reading",(0,4),W); draw((-1,2)--(0,2)..(.2,1.8)..(.4,2)--(4,2)..(4.2,2.2)..(4.4,2)--(5,2),linewidth(2pt));

#494 — c186_L19_p32193_solution_text_5.asy

0.0000 · Bad Content 0.8120 Size 0.0000

HiTeXeR

Source

//Gives the maximum line that fits in the box. path maxLine(pair A, pair B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax) { pair[] endpoints = intersectionpoints(A+10(B-A) -- A-10(B-A), (xmin, ymin)--(xmin, ymax)--(xmax, ymax)--(xmax, ymin)--cycle); if (endpoints.length >= 2) return endpoints[0]--endpoints[1]; else return nullpath; } import olympiad; unitsize(15); pair O, V, U, P, invAV, invBinvAV; real theta = 45; O = (0,0); V = (3, -1); U = (3,1); invAV = dir(-theta)*V; P = foot(invAV, O, U); invBinvAV = 2P - invAV; draw(maxLine(O, U, -2,5,-2,5), dashed); draw(O--V, red, Arrow(size = 0.3cm)); draw(O -- invAV, brown, Arrow(size = 0.3cm)); draw(O -- invBinvAV, blue, Arrow(size = 0.3cm)); label("$\mathbf{A} \mathbf{B} \mathbf{c}$", O--V, NE); label("$\mathbf{B}\mathbf{c}$", invAV/2, SW); label("$\mathbf{c}$", invBinvAV, W);
Open in HiTeXeR

size(230); import three; currentprojection = orthographic(4.3, 2.7, 1.4); //The projection of V onto U triple proj(triple U, triple V) { return dot(U, V)/dot(U, U)*U; } //Gives the maximum line that fits in the 3D box, assuming A is already in the box: path3 maxLineBox(triple A, triple B, real xmin, real xmax, real ymin, real ymax, real zmin, real zmax) { //Direction vector for the line: triple lineDir = unit(A-B); //The coordinates of the relevant restrictions as arrays, to allow easy looping: real[] minCoords = {xmin, ymin, zmin}; real[] maxCoords = {xmax, ymax, zmax}; real[] pointCoords = {A.x, A.y, A.z}; real[] dirCoords = {lineDir.x, lineDir.y, lineDir.z}; real[] maxRestrictions = {}; real[] minRestrictions = {}; //Go through the coordinates, and if the coordinate in the direction //of the line isn't 0, record the resulting restriction: for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) { if(dirCoords[i] != 0) { real bound1 = (maxCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; real bound2 = (minCoords[i] - pointCoords[i])/dirCoords[i]; minRestrictions.push(min(bound1, bound2)); maxRestrictions.push(max(bound1, bound2)); } } real smin = max(minRestrictions); real smax = min(maxRestrictions); return(A + smin*lineDir -- A + smax*lineDir); } //Gives the maximum line between A and B that fits in the plane centered on point //P, normal vector N, and the length and width specified. path3 maxLinePlane(triple A, triple B, triple P, triple N, real horWidth, real verWidth) { triple[] endpoints; triple dir1, dir2; //Orthonormal basis for our plane, in which dir1 has a 0 z-component, //unless normal vector is (0, 0, 1): if (N.x ==0 & N.y == 0) { dir1 = (1,0,0); dir2 = (0,1,0); } else { dir1 = unit((N.y, -N.x, 0)); dir2 = unit(cross(dir1, N)); } pair AProj = (dot(A-P, dir1), dot(A-P, dir2)); pair BProj = (dot(B-P, dir1), dot(B-P, dir2)); path box2D = (-horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--(-horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, verWidth/2)--(horWidth/2, -verWidth/2)--cycle; real s = 2*(abs(horWidth) + abs(verWidth)); pair[] ends2D = intersectionpoints(AProj + s*unit(BProj - AProj)--AProj - s*unit(BProj - AProj), box2D); if (ends2D.length > 1) { endpoints[0] = dot(ends2D[0], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[0], (0,1))*dir2; endpoints[1] = dot(ends2D[1], (1,0)) * dir1 + dot(ends2D[1], (0,1)) *dir2; return (P+endpoints[1])--(P+endpoints[0]); } else return nullpath3; } //Finds intersection point between line and plane, then draws the line //from start of line to intersection point. If no intersections, returns nullpath3 path3 lineUntilPlane(path3 line, surface plane) { triple[] ints = intersectionpoints(line, plane); if (ints.length > 0) { return ints[0]--relpoint(line, 0); } else return nullpath3; } triple A,B,C, P, D1, D2; triple tailP, tailD1, tailD2; real verHeight; //Scale to make plane taller. verHeight = 5; //A point on the plane: A = (1, 0, 0); //Other points on the plane: B = (0,1,0); C =(0,0,1); //Vectors whose linear combinations we're taking: D1 = B-A; D2 = C-A; //The size of the 3D grid: real xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax; xmin = -4; xmax = 4; ymin = -4; ymax = 4; zmin = -4; zmax = 4; triple horPoint, Normal, horVec, verVec, helperVec; path3 horLine, upperPath, lowerPath, planeBoundary, xyplane; real horWidth; //Path corresponding to the xy plane: path3 xyplane = (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y -- (xmin + 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y-- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymax - 0.1)*Y -- (xmax - 0.1)*X + (ymin + 0.1)*Y--cycle; //The normal vector: Normal = unit(cross(D1, D2)); //A point on the plane that's also on the plane z = 0. if (Normal.y == 0) horPoint = ((dot(A, Normal) - Normal.y)/Normal.x, 1, 0); else horPoint = (1, (dot(A, Normal) - Normal.x)/Normal.y, 0); //A vector that lies along our plane with a 0 z-component. horVec = (Normal.y, -Normal.x, 0); //A vector such that this vector and horVec are an orthogonal basis //for the plane; helperVec = unit(cross(Normal, horVec)); //A vector with a positive z component such that horVec and verVec form //an orthogonal basis for the plane. verVec = verHeight*(helperVec.z/abs(helperVec.z))*helperVec; //Paths corresponding to upper and lower halves of the plane. horLine = maxLineBox(horPoint, horPoint + 2*horVec, xmin+0.3, xmax-0.3, ymin+0.3, ymax-0.3, zmin+0.3, zmax-0.3); upperPath = horLine-- shift(verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; lowerPath = horLine-- shift(-verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; //The plane boundary is the two paths put together. planeBoundary = shift(2*verVec)*horLine-- shift(-2*verVec)*reverse(horLine)--cycle; horWidth = arclength(horLine); draw(lowerPath, dashed); draw(upperPath, dashed); draw(lowerPath, dotted); dot("$O$", O, S); draw(O-- zmax*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmin*Z, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(lowerPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(lineUntilPlane(O-- zmin*Z, surface(lowerPath))); draw(lowerPath); draw(surface(xyplane), rgb(211, 240, 242), nolight); draw(O-- xmax*X, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymin*Y, Arrow3(5)); draw(surface(upperPath), paleyellow, nolight); draw(O--xmin*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O--ymin*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(zmax*Z--O, surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- xmax*X, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- ymax*Y, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(lineUntilPlane(xmax*X -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(lineUntilPlane(ymax*Y -- O,surface(upperPath))); draw(O-- zmin*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(O-- zmax*Z, dotted, Arrow3(5)); draw(upperPath); draw(lowerPath,dotted); label("$x$", xmax*X, S); label("$y$", ymax*Y, S); label("$z$", zmax*Z, N);
Open in HiTeXeR

import olympiad; import markers; size(200); pair V, WW, O, F; O = (0,0); V = (4, 1); WW = (1, 2); F = foot(WW, O, V); draw(O--V--V+WW--WW--cycle); draw(O--V, red, Arrow(7)); draw(O--WW, blue, Arrow(7)); draw(WW--F, dashed); draw(rightanglemark(WW, F, O, 5)); markangle("$ heta$", V, O, WW, radius = 10); label("$\mathbf{v}$", O--V, SE); label("$\mathbf{w}$", O--WW, NW);

size(180); draw((0,1)--(0,4),linewidth(1.2)+blue); draw((0,4)--(2,4),linewidth(1.2)+blue); draw((2,4)--(2,1),linewidth(1.2)+blue); draw((2,1)--(0,1),linewidth(1.2)+blue); dot((0,1),3+blue); label("$(Lx_1,Ly_1)$",(0,1),SW,blue+fontsize(8)); dot((2,4),3+blue); label("$(Ux_1,Uy_1)$",(2,4),NE,blue+fontsize(8)); dot((0,4),3+blue); dot((2,1),3+blue); draw((1,1)--(5,1),linewidth(1.2)+darkgreen); draw((5,1)--(5,-1),linewidth(1.2)+darkgreen); draw((5,-1)--(1,-1),linewidth(1.2)+darkgreen); draw((1,-1)--(1,1),linewidth(1.2)+darkgreen); dot((1,-1),3+darkgreen);; label("$(Lx_2,Ly_2)$",(1,-1),SW,darkgreen+fontsize(8)); dot((5,1),3+darkgreen); label("$(Ux_2,Uy_2)$",(5,1),NE,darkgreen+fontsize(8)); dot((5,-1),3+darkgreen); dot((1,1),3+darkgreen);
